# FFCAP_ET_SAWTOOTHUP | Apple Developer Documentation

-  FFCAP_ET_SAWTOOTHUP 

Global Variable# FFCAP_ET_SAWTOOTHUP

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFCAP_ET_SAWTOOTHUP: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffcap_et_sawtoothup#Discussion)

The effect represents a sawtooth up force effect.
